build.scope_note: Storybook-only feature; storefront theme version on vcst-qa is unrelated. Tested directly on vcst-qa-storybook where the dark-mode toolbar controls are already live.

exploratory.charter: Risk charter for VCST-4839 storybook dark mode toggle

notes: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast: VcButton primary amber (#d4a562) on white = 2.8:1 — below 4.5:1 threshold. Pre-existing design token value, NOT introduced by this PR. Out of scope for VCST-4839; should be tracked separately if not already.
Banner DOM-order check (C9) is marked INFO — no preset without a dark variant exists today, so the missing-preset banner cannot be triggered live. Code path verified by review.
darkMode:'system' is supported in code but intentionally not exposed in the UI dropdown — works via URL globals (verified EC1).
